description_long: This modern bungalow features a rectangular layout with a flat roof and a minimalist facade. The front showcases two large, vertically oriented windows flanking a central entryway, with decorative planters and a tall palm tree adding a touch of greenery. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal gray siding, while the interior reveals a split-level design with a staircase and open living spaces. The rear section includes a large window and a partially open area, possibly for a patio or garden. The roof is flat and accessible, with no visible overhangs or eaves. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows, gray siding, and a prominent palm tree, featuring open interior spaces and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view with two large windows, central entry, decorative planters, and a tall palm tree to the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the palm tree, grouped front windows, and a large rear window with a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain gray siding, minimal window openings, and the palm tree visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the flat roof, rear window, and the overall rectangular structure with the palm tree to the left.
